title: taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. salsugineum
intro: Taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. salsugineum is a subspecies of the dandelion plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family, and is commonly found in dry, grassy areas and along roadsides. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve liver and kidney issues, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. salsugineum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used to support liver and kidney health, as well as to aid in detoxification.
